description: You are a Data Analyst at the Chinook digital media store. The marketing team wants to launch a cross-selling campaign and needs to know which artists are frequently purchased together. Perform a Market Basket Analysis using DBeaver by connecting to the Chinook SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db (Connection name: 'Chinook'). Identify pairs of artists that appear in the same invoice, ensuring the first artist name is alphabetically less than the second to avoid duplicates. Count the co-occurrences for each pair and export the results to /home/ga/Documents/exports/artist_affinity_pairs.csv with headers 'Artist_A', 'Artist_B', and 'CoOccurrenceCount', sorted by count descending. Save the SQL query script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/affinity_query.sql. Use the schema: InvoiceItems -> Tracks -> Albums -> Artists.
